description: Create a 'Film Noir' style black-and-white studio lighting setup using the HDRI environment located at /home/ga/assets/studio_small_09_1k.exr. Configure the world lighting with a Z-Rotation of 125 degrees and set the saturation to 0.0 to achieve a monochromatic effect. Render the final image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/noir_render.png and save the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/noir_setup.blend.
